properties.sql: WITH signed AS (SELECT c_envelope_code AS envelope_code, c_account_path AS account_path, datecreated, CASE WHEN c_direction = 'debit' THEN CAST(c_amount AS NUMERIC(15,2)) WHEN c_direction = 'credit' THEN -CAST(c_amount AS NUMERIC(15,2)) ELSE 0 END AS signed_amt FROM app_fd_budget_event WHERE c_envelope_code IS NOT NULL AND c_envelope_code <> '' AND c_account_path LIKE 'ENV_%'), open AS (SELECT envelope_code, SUM(CASE WHEN account_path LIKE 'ENV_%.ALLOCATED'     THEN signed_amt ELSE 0 END) AS opening_allocated, SUM(CASE WHEN account_path LIKE 'ENV_%.AVAILABLE'     THEN signed_amt ELSE 0 END) AS opening_available, SUM(CASE WHEN account_path LIKE 'ENV_%.RESERVED'      THEN signed_amt ELSE 0 END) AS opening_reserved, SUM(CASE WHEN account_path LIKE 'ENV_%.PRE_COMMITTED' THEN signed_amt ELSE 0 END) AS opening_pre_committed, SUM(CASE WHEN account_path LIKE 'ENV_%.COMMITTED'     THEN signed_amt ELSE 0 END) AS opening_committed, SUM(CASE WHEN account_path LIKE 'ENV_%.EXPENSED'      THEN signed_amt ELSE 0 END) AS opening_expensed FROM signed WHERE NULLIF('#requestParam.from?sql#', '') IS NULL OR datecreated < NULLIF('#requestParam.from?sql#', '')::timestamp GROUP BY envelope_code), per AS (SELECT envelope_code, SUM(CASE WHEN account_path LIKE 'ENV_%.ALLOCATED'     THEN signed_amt ELSE 0 END) AS delta_allocated, SUM(CASE WHEN account_path LIKE 'ENV_%.AVAILABLE'     THEN signed_amt ELSE 0 END) AS delta_available, SUM(CASE WHEN account_path LIKE 'ENV_%.RESERVED'      THEN signed_amt ELSE 0 END) AS delta_reserved, SUM(CASE WHEN account_path LIKE 'ENV_%.PRE_COMMITTED' THEN signed_amt ELSE 0 END) AS delta_pre_committed, SUM(CASE WHEN account_path LIKE 'ENV_%.COMMITTED'     THEN signed_amt ELSE 0 END) AS delta_committed, SUM(CASE WHEN account_path LIKE 'ENV_%.EXPENSED'      THEN signed_amt ELSE 0 END) AS delta_expensed FROM signed WHERE (NULLIF('#requestParam.from?sql#', '') IS NULL OR datecreated >= NULLIF('#requestParam.from?sql#', '')::timestamp) AND (NULLIF('#requestParam.to?sql#', '')   IS NULL OR datecreated <  NULLIF('#requestParam.to?sql#', '')::timestamp + INTERVAL '1 day') GROUP BY envelope_code), envs AS (SELECT DISTINCT envelope_code FROM signed) SELECT e.envelope_code AS id, e.envelope_code, COALESCE(reg.c_name, env.c_programme_code, e.envelope_code) AS programme_name, to_char(COALESCE(o.opening_allocated, 0), 'FM999,999,999.00') AS opening_allocated_disp, to_char(COALESCE(p.delta_allocated,    0), 'FM999,999,999.00') AS delta_allocated_disp, to_char(COALESCE(p.delta_reserved,     0), 'FM999,999,999.00') AS delta_reserved_disp, to_char(COALESCE(p.delta_pre_committed, 0),'FM999,999,999.00') AS delta_pre_committed_disp, to_char(COALESCE(p.delta_committed,    0), 'FM999,999,999.00') AS delta_committed_disp, to_char(COALESCE(p.delta_expensed,     0), 'FM999,999,999.00') AS delta_expensed_disp, to_char(COALESCE(o.opening_allocated, 0) + COALESCE(p.delta_allocated, 0), 'FM999,999,999.00') AS closing_allocated_disp, to_char(COALESCE(o.opening_committed, 0) + COALESCE(p.delta_committed, 0), 'FM999,999,999.00') AS closing_committed_disp, to_char(COALESCE(o.opening_available, 0) + COALESCE(p.delta_available, 0), 'FM999,999,999.00') AS closing_available_disp FROM envs e LEFT JOIN open o  ON o.envelope_code = e.envelope_code LEFT JOIN per  p  ON p.envelope_code = e.envelope_code LEFT JOIN app_fd_budget_envelope env ON env.c_code = e.envelope_code LEFT JOIN app_fd_mm_registration reg ON reg.c_code = env.c_programme_code ORDER BY e.envelope_code
properties.countSql: SELECT count(DISTINCT c_envelope_code) FROM app_fd_budget_event WHERE c_envelope_code IS NOT NULL AND c_envelope_code <> ''
